scripts.api:dev: pnpm --filter @apex-card/shared build && pnpm --filter @apex/database build && pnpm --filter @apex/api dev
scripts.api:build: pnpm --filter @apex-card/shared build && pnpm --filter @apex/database build && pnpm --filter @apex/api build
scripts.api:typecheck: pnpm --filter @apex-card/shared build && pnpm --filter @apex/database build && pnpm --filter @apex/api typecheck
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @apex-card/shared build && pnpm --filter @apex/database build && pnpm --filter @apex/api build && pnpm --filter @apex/admin-web build
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:push: pnpm exec prisma db push --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:status: pnpm exec prisma migrate status --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:reset: pnpm exec prisma migrate reset --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma
